chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-190 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on office objection (s) 2. For order on M.A No.2333/2024 3. For hearing of main case 27.10.2025 None is present for the applicant. No intimation is received. The same has been the position on the last several dates of hearing. It appears from the perusal of the impugned order dated 24.01.2025, passed by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Tando Muhammad Khan that the applicant/complainant was aggrieved by certain alleged actions on the part of the proposed accused/respondents arising out of a dispute pertaining to an alleged sale transaction concerning property described in the impugned order. The narrative of the background to the dispute, as set out in the impugned order, suggests that the parties are at a disconnect with regard to their respective rights over the property/possession which allegedly includes certain claims also made by the Pak Army Defence Force. I do not find any defect in the impugned order, wherein the learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace has found that the information essentially concerns a civil dispute and the application was/is dismissed with directions to the concerned SHO to ensure that peace is maintained between the applicant and the proposed accused/respondents. The Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed in view of the above observations. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
